title: Contact Dispatch - Chat with Your Ambulance or Hospital
summary: Send messages to your ambulance driver or hospital staff directly from the tracking screen. Quick actions for common updates like ETA changes, pickup changes, and arrival notifications.

changes.message: Added Contact Dispatch chat to tracking screen for communicating with ambulance drivers and hospital staff during emergencies.
Quick action buttons for common messages: Moving toward ambulance, Meet halfway, Pickup changed, Please call me, We arrived.
Real-time message updates when chat is open, so you see new messages without refreshing.
Message history shows all communication with grouped messages and clear sender labels (you, driver, hospital).
Automatic room creation when you start tracking, with secure access limited to you and your assigned responders.
Messages are automatically marked as read when you open the chat.
Chat is disabled for completed/archived requests to prevent confusion.
Message validation prevents empty or overly long messages.
Retry protection prevents duplicate messages if you send the same message twice.
Loading states and skeleton placeholders while fetching message history.
Clean, accessible chat interface with large text and clear visual hierarchy.
Final Contact Dispatch hardening improved sticky composer behavior, message ordering, realtime reconciliation, and sender labels.
